features.title: SKILL.md Authenticity Gate Section
features.description: Add an Authenticity Gate section to SKILL.md after the Quantified Evaluation section. Defines 4 dimensions (coherence, intentionality, craft, fitness for purpose) as binary pass/fail, runs after domain criteria scoring, any dimension failure fails the round. Uses generic middleware language only.
features.source_requirement: Authenticity Gate middleware layer -- foundation section in SKILL.md
steps: Read current SKILL.md and locate the Quantified Evaluation section
Verify an Authenticity Gate section exists immediately after Quantified Evaluation
Verify all 4 dimensions are defined with generic definitions: coherence, intentionality, craft, fitness for purpose
Verify binary pass/fail semantics are specified
Verify ordering is specified: gate runs AFTER domain criteria scoring
Verify failure rule is stated: any dimension fail = round fail
Verify no domain-specific terminology is present in the new section
evidence: Round 1: All 7 verification steps satisfied. Section placed after Quantified Evaluation with 4 dimensions, binary pass/fail, ordering, failure rule, coherence disambiguation. Zero domain-specific terms (automated scan).

features.title: Evaluation Schema and Builder Report Template Updates
features.description: Add authenticity_gate object to the NN-evaluation.json schema in patterns.md (4 dimensions, each with pass/fail + justification). Add authenticity self-check section to the NN-builder-report.md template.
features.source_requirement: Evaluation schema and builder report template updates for authenticity gate
steps: Read current patterns.md
Verify authenticity_gate object is added to NN-evaluation.json schema with 4 dimensions (coherence, intentionality, craft, fitness_for_purpose), each with pass/fail boolean and justification string
Verify the JSON schema is syntactically valid
Verify authenticity self-check section is added to NN-builder-report.md template
Verify builder report template section uses generic middleware language
evidence: Round 1: All 5 verification steps satisfied. authenticity_gate object with gate_result + 4 dimensions in NN-evaluation.json schema. JSON validated via python json.loads(). Self-check section in builder report template. Generic language throughout.

features.title: Generator Pre-Implementation Checklist
features.description: Add an authenticity pre-implementation checklist to the generator agent file (generator.md). Checklist instructs the generator to define conventions, customize defaults, verify fundamentals, and ensure usability. Prevention side of dual-side control.
features.source_requirement: Generator-side prevention via pre-implementation authenticity checklist
steps: Read current plugins/harness/agents/generator.md
Verify an Authenticity Pre-Implementation Checklist section exists
Verify 4 checklist items are present, mapping to the 4 dimensions
Verify checklist uses generic middleware language (no domain-specific terms)
Verify it integrates naturally with the existing sprint round sequence
evidence: Round 2: All 5 verification steps satisfied. Checklist exists in generator.md under Sprint Round Sequence with 4 items mapping to coherence, intentionality, craft, fitness_for_purpose. Generic language (automated scan). Integrates between step 5 and Post-Implementation Commit.

features.title: Generator Role Reference Update
features.description: Add authenticity instructions to roles/generator.md so the role-scoped reference includes pre-implementation checklist guidance.
features.source_requirement: Role reference update for generator authenticity guidance
steps: Read current plugins/harness/skills/harness/roles/generator.md
Verify an Authenticity section exists with focus-level guidance
Verify it references the pre-implementation checklist without duplicating full details
Verify generic middleware language is used throughout
evidence: Round 2: All 4 verification steps satisfied. Authenticity section exists in roles/generator.md with focus-level guidance. References Pre-Implementation Checklist from generator agent file. No duplication of full details. Generic language throughout.

features.title: Evaluator Post-Grading Gate
features.description: Add the authenticity post-grading gate to the evaluator agent file (evaluator.md). After existing grading, checks coherence, intentionality, craft, and fitness for purpose. Binary pass/fail -- any dimension failure fails the round.
features.source_requirement: Evaluator-side detection via post-grading authenticity gate
steps: Read current plugins/harness/agents/evaluator.md
Verify a step for Authenticity Gate exists after the existing grading/calibration steps
Verify 4 dimension checks are included with verification methods
Verify binary pass/fail semantics are specified
Verify that authenticity failure overrides domain criteria pass
Verify generic middleware language is used throughout
evidence: Round 2: All 6 verification steps satisfied. Step 5 Authenticity Gate exists after step 4 Calibration. 4 dimension checks with verification methods in table. Binary pass/fail specified. Override rule: 'any dimension fails, the round FAILS -- regardless of domain criteria scores'. Generic language (automated scan).

features.title: Evaluator Role Reference Update
features.description: Add the authenticity gate to roles/evaluator.md so the role-scoped reference includes post-grading gate instructions.
features.source_requirement: Role reference update for evaluator authenticity gate
steps: Read current plugins/harness/skills/harness/roles/evaluator.md
Verify an Authenticity Gate section exists under grading responsibilities
Verify it references the post-grading gate without duplicating full details
